rules.message: You indicated an attachment ('Child support order') — make sure the document is actually attached to the filing.

then.suggest: A court time like this without AM/PM is almost always PM — confirm 'At any time required by court' is PM, not AM.

rules.message: 'At any time required by court' looks like an early-hour time with no AM/PM; court times are almost always PM — confirm.
